get_crm_v3_objects_contacts.description: Retrieve all contacts, using query parameters to specify the information that gets returned.

after.description: The paging cursor token of the last successfully read resource will be returned as the `paging.next.after` JSON property of a paged response containing more results.

archived.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived.

associations.description: A comma separated list of object types to retrieve associated IDs for. If any of the specified associations do not exist, they will be ignored.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to display per page.

properties.description: A comma separated list of the properties to be returned in the response. If any of the specified properties are not present on the requested object(s), they will be ignored.

get_crm_v3_objects_contacts_contact_id.description: Retrieve a contact by its ID (`contactId`) or by a unique property (`idProperty`). You can specify what is returned using the `properties` query parameter.

archived.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived.

associations.description: A comma separated list of object types to retrieve associated IDs for. If any of the specified associations do not exist, they will be ignored.

idProperty.description: The name of a property whose values are unique for this object type

properties.description: A comma separated list of the properties to be returned in the response. If any of the specified properties are not present on the requested object(s), they will be ignored.

propertiesWithHistory.description: A comma separated list of the properties to be returned along with their history of previous values. If any of the specified properties are not present on the requested object(s), they will be igno...

patch_crm_v3_objects_contacts_contact_id.description: Update an existing contact, identified by ID or email/unique property value. To identify a contact by ID, include the ID in the request URL path. To identify a contact by their email or other uniqu...

idProperty.description: The name of a property whose values are unique for this object type

properties.description: Key value pairs representing the properties of the object.

post_crm_v3_objects_contacts.description: Create a single contact. Include a `properties` object to define [property values](https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/guides/api/crm/properties) for the contact, along with an `associations` array...

properties.description: Key-value pairs for setting properties for the new object.

post_crm_v3_objects_contacts_batch_read.description: Retrieve a batch of contacts by ID (`contactId`) or unique property value (`idProperty`).

archived.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived.

idProperty.description: When using a custom unique value property to retrieve records, the name of the property. Do not include this parameter if retrieving by record ID.

properties.description: Key-value pairs for setting properties for the new object.

propertiesWithHistory.description: Key-value pairs for setting properties for the new object and their histories.

post_crm_v3_objects_contacts_batch_upser.display_name: Create or update a batch of contacts
post_crm_v3_objects_contacts_batch_upser.description: Upsert a batch of contacts. The `inputs` array can contain a `properties` object to define property values for each record.

post_crm_v3_objects_contacts_gdpr_delete.description: Permanently delete a contact and all associated content to follow GDPR. Use optional property `idProperty` set to `email` to identify contact by email address. If email address is not found, the em...

idProperty.description: The name of a property whose values are unique for this object. An alternative to identifying a contact by ID.

objectId.description: The ID of the contact to permanently delete.

post_crm_v3_objects_contacts_merge.description: Merge two contact records. Learn more about [merging records](https://knowledge.hubspot.com/records/merge-records).

objectIdToMerge.description: The object ID of the record that the merge will not set as the current value after the merge.

primaryObjectId.description: The object ID of the record that the merge will generally set as the current value after the merge.

post_crm_v3_objects_contacts_search.description: Search for contacts by filtering on properties, searching through associations, and sorting results. Learn more about [CRM search](https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/guides/api/crm/search#make-a-s...

after.description: A paging cursor token for retrieving subsequent pages.

filterGroups.description: Up to 6 groups of filters defining additional query criteria.

limit.description: The maximum results to return, up to 200 objects.

properties.description: A list of property names to include in the response.

query.description: The search query string, up to 3000 characters.

sorts.description: Specifies sorting order based on object properties.

completedAt.description: The timestamp when the batch processing was completed, in ISO 8601 format.

links.description: An object containing relevant links related to the batch request.

requestedAt.description: The timestamp when the batch request was initially made, in ISO 8601 format.

startedAt.description: The timestamp when the batch processing began, in ISO 8601 format.

status.description: The status of the batch processing request. The expected value is "COMPLETE".

links.description: An object containing relevant links related to the batch request.

requestedAt.description: The timestamp when the batch process was initiated, in ISO 8601 format.

startedAt.description: The timestamp when the batch process began execution, in ISO 8601 format.

archivedAt.description: The timestamp when the object was archived, in ISO 8601 format.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the object was created, in ISO 8601 format.

id.description: The unique ID of the object.

objectWriteTraceId.description: An identifier used for tracing the write request for the object.

properties.description: Key-value pairs representing the properties of the object.

propertiesWithHistory.description: Key-value pairs representing the properties of the object along with their history.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the object was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

url.description: The URL associated with the object.

associations.description: A list defining relationships with other objects.
